title: Exact Numerical Linear Algebra Error Bounds

solver_reuse.target: numerical linear algebra bad residual/Jacobi-bound QF_LRA/Farkas regression seeds
solver_reuse.pressure: Malformed residual-bound and Jacobi error-bound rows where exact replay computes residual_inf_norm = 1 and jacobi_error1_inf_norm = 7/44, but the rows claim residual_inf_norm <= 1/2 and jacobi_error1_inf_norm <= 1/8.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional finite residual, interval, or iteration rows only when they add distinct exact-linear solver pressure; keep floating-point error, conditioning, and convergence-rate claims in Lean-horizon or numerical-honesty lanes.

graduation_criteria: Encode residual bounds, solution boxes, and fixed-point iteration steps as deterministic QF_LRA obligations.
Replay every SAT witness through exact rational matrix and norm evaluation.
Route false residual-bound and finite iteration-error rows through checked QF_LRA/Farkas certificates once source quantities are replayed exactly.
Keep floating-point rounding, backward-error theorems, and broad convergence claims out of scope until the numerical-honesty schema exists.
